name: classic-deep-skeuomorphism
description: 经典深度拟物化风格 - 皮革缝线、拉丝金属、木质边框、玻璃高光、厚重阴影、pre-iOS7 标志性抛光质感

typography.headers: Helvetica Neue Bold / Myriad Pro / Lucida Grande

prompt_template: Classic deep skeuomorphic slide design, pre-iOS7 app polish, stitched leather, brushed metal, glossy beveled buttons, engraved labels, subtle wood trim, glass reflections, warm background {background}, tactile dashboard modules, rich gradients, heavy inner and drop shadows, readable title hierarchy, premium retro-tech presentation, --ar {aspect_ratio} --style raw --v 6
negative_prompt: flat design, minimalism, neumorphism, glassmorphism, brutalism, neon cyberpunk, low-detail texture, photorealistic people, messy collage, thin outlines, monochrome corporate dashboard
